'''Bextar''' was one of four [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giants]] in the [[Velcar Free Commerce Zone]]'s [[Bextar system/Legends|Bextar system]]. It was the site of several [[Amber Sun Mining Corporate]] [[gas mine]]s. [[Color/Legends|Amber]] [[Star/Legends|Sun]] imported [[Entymal]] [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]] as [[Miner/Legends|miners]].
